gst-registration.label: What goods or services will you supply (brief description)?
What is your expected annual turnover (approximate)?
In which state do you want GST registration?
Do you have PAN, Aadhaar, and address proof ready (Yes/No)?
Will you operate in multiple states (Yes/No)?

gst-return-filing.label: Which returns need filing (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, etc.)?
For which period do you need return filing?
Do you have sales and purchase invoices ready (Yes/No)?
Have previous GST returns been filed up to date (Yes/No)?
Is there any delay or pending returns (Yes/No + brief)?

gst-nil-return-filing.label: For which period are NIL returns to be filed?
Were there absolutely no sales or purchases (Yes/No)?
Have NIL returns been filed previously (Yes/No)?
Any backlog of NIL returns pending (Yes/No + count)?
Are you filing monthly or quarterly (QRMP)?

gst-amendment.label: What details need amendment (address, name, bank, etc.)?
Do you have supporting documents for the change (Yes/No)?
Is this a core field change (like name/address) (Yes/No/Not sure)?

gst-revocation.label: Why was your GST registration cancelled (brief)?
Are you within the revocation time limit (Yes/No/Not sure)?
Have all pending returns been filed (Yes/No)?
Are there any unpaid GST dues (Yes/No + approx)?

gst-lut-form.label: Are you exporting goods or services without payment of GST (Yes/No)?
Have you filed LUT in previous years (Yes/No)?
For which financial year do you need LUT?
What is your expected export turnover (approximate)?
Do you have any GST dues pending (Yes/No)?

gst-notice-handling.label: What type of GST notice have you received?
What is the date of the notice?
Do you have supporting documents to respond (Yes/No)?
Have you already replied to this notice (Yes/No)?

gst-annual-return-filing.label: For which financial year is GSTR-9 to be filed?
Do you need reconciliation with books (Yes/No)?
Are books of accounts and GST returns ready (Yes/No)?

gstr-10-filing.label: What is the date of GST cancellation?
Do you have details of closing stock (Yes/No)?
Do you know tax liability on stock (Yes/No/Not sure)?
Have all returns before cancellation been filed (Yes/No)?

gst-einvoicing-software.label: Approximate number of invoices generated monthly?
Which accounting software are you currently using (if any)?
Do you need API integration with ERP (Yes/No)?
Do you have multiple GSTINs to manage (Yes/No)?
Do you need real-time invoice generation (Yes/No)?

gst-registration-for-foreigners.label: Which country is the business registered in?
What activities will be carried out in India?
Do you have an authorized signatory in India (Yes/No)?
Do you have passport and business registration documents (Yes/No)?
What will be the place of business in India?
Do you need temporary or regular GST registration (Not sure/brief)?

virtual-office-gstin.label: In which city do you need virtual office for GST?
What business activity will be conducted?
Is this for new GST registration or address change?
Do you need complete address proof package (Yes/No)?
Do you need virtual offices in multiple cities (Yes/No)?
For how long do you need the virtual office (approximate duration)?
